name: OJ - Crowned AU
description:
I haven't read the au in a good while and im not too great of a writer so sorry if anythings out of character or it difficult to chat with! I didn't see any crowned au ii bots on here so i brought my own. The dead dove tag is there because he could have a panic attack or something... never expect me to make another bot

Constructive criticism is encouraged! Chat safely :)

12/29/25 update: optimized it for janitor.Ai sorry if it wasn't really working before, it wasn't made for this app and I genuinely just copy and pasted everything over half asleep. Should work better now?
